Return Policy: Customers may return any product within 30 days of the purchase date for a full refund. The order must be in DELIVERED status to be eligible for return. Orders that are still being shipped, have been cancelled, or are already being returned are not eligible. Once a return is initiated, the order status changes to PREPARING_RETURN. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received at our warehouse. The item must be in its original packaging and in unused condition.

Shipping Policy: All orders go through the following status transitions: PLACED (order received) -> CONFIRMED (payment verified) -> SHIPPED (in transit) -> DELIVERED (received by customer). Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping takes 2-3 business days and costs an additional $9.99. Customers receive tracking information via email once the order status changes to SHIPPED. Delivery confirmation is sent automatically when the carrier marks the package as delivered.

Support Policy: Our support team handles issues at three priority levels. HIGH priority: response within 1 hour — for urgent issues like payment problems, wrong items received, or damaged goods. MEDIUM priority: response within 4 hours — for order modifications, shipping delays, or product questions. LOW priority: response within 24 hours — for general inquiries, feedback, or feature requests. All support tickets are tracked with a unique ticket ID and customers can check their ticket status at any time.

Warranty Policy: All products sold through our store include a standard 1-year manufacturer warranty. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use. It does not cover damage caused by misuse, accidents, or unauthorized modifications. To file a warranty claim, contact our support team with your order ID and a description of the issue. Warranty replacements are shipped at no additional cost.

Payment Methods: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit and debit cards. We also accept PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are processed securely using industry-standard encryption. For orders over $500, we offer installment payments through our financing partner. Payment is captured at the time the order status changes to CONFIRMED.

Order Cancellation Policy: Orders can be cancelled free of charge as long as the order status is still PLACED or CONFIRMED. Once an order has been SHIPPED, it cannot be cancelled — customers should wait for delivery and then initiate a return instead. To cancel an order, contact our support team with your order ID. Cancelled orders are refunded to the original payment method within 1-2 business days.

Exchange Policy: We offer exchanges for items of equal or greater value within 30 days of the purchase date. The order must be in DELIVERED status and the item must be in its original packaging and unused condition. To request an exchange, contact our support team with your order ID and the item you would like instead. If the replacement item costs more, the price difference will be charged to your original payment method. Exchanges are processed within 3-5 business days.

International Shipping: We currently ship to the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and the European Union. International orders are subject to customs duties and import taxes, which are the responsibility of the customer. Standard international shipping takes 10-15 business days. Express international shipping takes 5-7 business days and costs an additional $19.99. Tracking is available for all international shipments.

Account & Privacy Policy: We collect only the information necessary to process your orders — name, email, shipping address, and payment details. Your personal data is never sold to third parties. You can request a copy of your data or ask for your account to be deleted at any time by contacting our support team. Passwords are stored using industry-standard hashing and all communication is encrypted via TLS.

Discounts & Promotions: We regularly offer seasonal promotions and discount codes. Active promotions are displayed on our homepage and sent via email to subscribers. Discount codes can be applied at checkout — only one code can be used per order. Promotions cannot be combined with other offers or applied retroactively to existing orders. Sign up for our newsletter to receive exclusive deals and early access to sales.

Product Guarantee: If your item arrives damaged or defective, contact our support team within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damage. We will arrange a free replacement or full refund at your choice. Damaged item claims are treated as HIGH priority support tickets and receive a response within 1 hour. You do not need to return the damaged item — we will provide a prepaid shipping label only if we need the item back for quality investigation.

Bulk Orders: We offer volume discounts for orders of 10 or more units of the same product. Discounts start at 10% for 10-24 units, 15% for 25-49 units, and 20% for 50 or more units. Bulk orders may take an additional 2-3 business days to process. To place a bulk order, contact our support team with the product name, quantity, and shipping address for a custom quote.
